title: BTD-EmisPred: machine learning workflow and cleaned dataset for NIR-II emission wavelength prediction
description: BTD-EmisPred provides a retrainable machine-learning workflow and lightweight web app for near-infrared-II fluorescence emission wavelength prediction from molecular SMILES and solvent labels. This release includes the cleaned molecule-solvent emission dataset, feature construction code, candidate model comparison workflow, XGBoost training workflow, and web application framework.
